title: Outcome Memories music discs
description: Replaces most of the default music discs with Outcome memories OSTs
body:
Simple resource pack that replaces minecraft music discs with OSTs from Sonic.EXE: OUTCOME MEMORIES

### Seeing as Outcome Memories is canceled as of January 26th 2026, this project will be archived due to the stress that the game caused for everyone involved. It will not be updated for later versions.

# SONGS:
## The main 9 survivors:
- C418 - ward / astranova - Friends No More: Round 2
- C418 - blocks / Lymphh & Kwispy - OUR DESTINY (Unofficial name)
- C418 - cat / Vasalto - The Sol Still Burns
- Aaron Cherof - Precipice / juno! - So, DON'T BLINK
- C418 - wait / aerozity - Once A Flower
- Aaron Cherof - Relic / aerozity - Wilted Blossom
- Lena Raine - Otherside / chozen - DEAD OR ALIVE
- C418 - mall / astranova - Cracked Empire
- Knuckles currently does not have a finished replacement for Feel The Fury
## Extras:
- Hyper Potions - Lava Chicken / aerozity - Not Perfect V2
- C418 - strad / Vasalto - Even Gods Can Bleed

### NOTES:
I did not create any of these songs.
All of the credit goes to the original composers/contributers:
- AstraNova
- Lymphh
- Kwispy
- dyno
- Vasalto
- juno!
- ThatGuyNamedPanther
- aerozity
- chozen
